articles.title: Senator Fanboys Over Clarence Thomas After Trump's Supreme Court Upsets
articles.content: After the high court delivered its final opinions of the term on Tuesday, Sen. Jim Banks (R-Indiana) exalted Thomas for his steadfast support of President Donald Trump’s agenda and dedication to conservative values. “I wish Clarence Thomas could live forever,” the senator raved to Real America’s Voice News. “He’s the greatest living human being, greatest living American that we have today in our country.”. Just hours earlier, Thomas issued a scathing 91-page dissent after the court rejected the Trump administration’s efforts to restrict birthright citizenship. Keep independent journalism alive
articles.summary:
